pom.xml.general_idea: Change the Maven compiler release target from Java 17 to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; without this change, the code would compile for Java 17, potentially missing new language features or causing incompatibilities with JDK 21-specific APIs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency for Jakarta RESTful Web Services API version 3.1.0.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x and Quarkus 3.x (implied by the recipe context) use Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces. The previous implicit or older version of JAX-RS may not be compatible or present, leading to compile errors for missing classes in the jakarta.ws.rs package.

pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the release configuration in the maven-compiler-plugin to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiler plugin configuration aligns with the property change, guaranteeing Java 21 bytecode generation.

src/main/java/org/acme/GreetingResource..general_idea: Migrate JAX-RS and CDI annotations from javax.* to jakarta.* namespace to align with Jakarta EE 10+ and Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/main/java/org/acme/GreetingResource..why_exists: Import resolution failure: classes in javax.ws.rs and javax.inject packages are removed in Jakarta EE 10+ and Spring Boot 3.x, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/org/acme/GreetingService.j.general_idea: Migrate Java EE import to Jakarta EE namespace to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
src/main/java/org/acme/GreetingService.j.why_exists: The javax.enterprise package does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (required by Spring Boot 3), causing a compile error: 'package javax.enterprise.context does not exist'.
